intro: 353 AI items this week (72 India-relevant) across 9 sources.

items.summary: arXiv:2607.11888v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a rigorous theoretical framework for optimal market making in perpetual futures markets with zero maker fees. We model the market maker's problem as a stochastic optimal control problem on a filtered probability space,…

items.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
items.summary: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

items.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
items.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open models?

items.title: 'Like my lover': Chinese users bid farewell to AI companions
items.summary: China implemented new rules on Wednesday to limit emotional reliance on AI companions. Major AI providers suspended custom agent and companion features before the deadline. These regulations target AI tools with human-like personalities and communication styles. That sparked a…

items.title: Zoho launches Classes 2.0, betting on AI to fix India’s education gaps
Shunya Labs wants voice infrastructure to work the way Indians speak
items.summary: Gurugram-based Shunya Labs builds voice AI that understands Indian languages and accents, helping enterprises deploy multilingual speech solutions.

items.title: The Unit Economics Of India’s Voice AI Boom
items.summary: India’s voice AI revolution has revolved around a few key pillars, such as speech recognition accuracy, multilingual capabilities, latency and…

items.title: US official says Nvidia has begun shipping powerful H200 AI chips to China
items.summary: In May, ⁠Reuters reported ⁠the Commerce Department had cleared around 10 Chinese firms to buy the H200, but no deliveries had been made at the time. Sources said at the time that Alibaba, Tencent and ​ByteDance were among those approved.

items.title: E3 Electric.Ai raises Rs 100 Cr in Series A round led by BluVenture
items.summary: The startup said the fresh capital will be used to accelerate product innovation, strengthen the company’s research and development efforts, and expand its market presence across India ahead of the commercial launch of its first scooter, E3 TRION.

items.title: Demis Hassabis says AGI could arrive within years, wants US body to review frontier AI models
This startup wants CFOs to treat cloud bills as innovation funds
items.summary: CloudLens AI analyses your AWS bill in 2 minutes, no infra access needed, and turns wasted cloud spend into your next AI project budget.

careers.note: Demand snapshot for 2026. ML Engineer is the most in-demand AI title; agentic-AI and deep-learning skills carry the highest pay premiums; Python + one cloud is the baseline. Specialisation beats generalisation for freshers.

paths.note: #1 AI title — build, deploy & maintain models in production. Best all-round entry into AI.
RAG, tool-use & multi-agent systems. ~40% of enterprise apps will embed AI agents by year-end.
Neural nets for vision & speech. Highest premiums; usually needs strong maths / grad study.
Ship & scale models on the cloud. Cloud AI certs add 20–25% to salary.
Foundational, widest entry door; a reliable first step into AI.
Imaging, robotics, autonomous systems, medical AI.
Powers chatbots, search & agents — the hottest application area.
5–8 yrs experience; $140k–$332k bands. Translates AI into business value.
Alignment, evals, red-teaming & policy — newer but expanding fast.

fresher.why: The lingua franca of ML — non-negotiable.
Linear algebra, probability & calculus — enough to reason about models.
Regression, classification, evaluation, the ML workflow.
Build & train neural nets; PyTorch dominates research & jobs.
Ship a small LLM app — the most visible skill to recruiters now.
Real AI work is mostly data; SQL is everywhere.
AWS leads (~40% of postings), then Azure & GCP. Version everything.
A deployed project that solves a real problem is the #1 differentiator.

experienced.why: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, model/versioning — production is where value lives.
Multi-agent orchestration, tool-use, evals — the surging frontier.
AWS/Azure/GCP architecture; certs add a 20–25% salary premium.
Adapt, measure and harden models for a domain.
Cost & latency engineering for large models.
Trade-offs across data, latency, cost & reliability at scale.
CV, NLP, recsys, healthcare — depth beats breadth at senior levels.
Leading teams and tying models to measurable outcomes.

profile.name: Harman Singh Sandhu
profile.blurb: I build AI/ML projects and write about them. This site is one of them — an automated daily AI digest.

repos.name: Ace-rentals
repos.desc: Ace Rentals: A full-stack property rental platform built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Features user authentication, image uploads, geocoding, reviews, and secure account management. Inspired by Airbnb.

repos.name: ai-weekly-report
repos.desc: My personalized AI newsletter that runs on an agentic AI
